flowEditor.title: Flow Editor
flowEditor.description: Official core extension for graphical editing and execution entry of Flow resources.
flowEditor.viewDescription: View, adjust and execute Flow resources in the project.

sessionEditor.title: Session Editor
sessionEditor.description: Official core extension for Session pacing, transitions and managed run entry.
sessionEditor.viewDescription: Edit Session pacing, transitions and managed run entry.

stateEditor.title: State Editor
stateEditor.description: Official workflow extension that consumes canonical state snapshots and provides debug auxiliary views.
stateEditor.viewDescription: View canonical state snapshots returned by Engine.
stateEditor.inspectorDescription: State summary card in the right inspector slot.

configEditor.title: Config Editor
configEditor.description: Official workflow extension for project configuration and runtime settings editing.
configEditor.viewDescription: View project configuration and runtime settings.

problems.title: Problems
problems.description: Official workflow extension for problem list and diagnostics query entry.
problems.viewDescription: View problem entries exposed by Kernel and Engine.
problems.panelDescription: Diagnostics summary in the bottom panel slot.

promptPreview.title: Prompt Preview
promptPreview.description: Official workflow extension for prompt preview and prompt-like configuration queries.
promptPreview.viewDescription: Preview Session prompts and prompt-like configurations in Flows.
promptPreview.inspectorDescription: Prompt preview card in the right inspector slot.

debugger.title: Debugger
debugger.description: Official workflow extension that consumes managed runs and debug state snapshots.
debugger.viewDescription: View current managed runs and debug state.
debugger.summaryDescription: Managed run summary in the right debug view slot.
debugger.tracePanelDescription: Selected run timeline in the bottom panel slot.
debugger.stateDiffPanelDescription: Selected run state diff in the bottom panel slot.

comments.title: Comments
comments.description: Official workflow extension for async comment threads and review coordination.
comments.inspectorDescription: Comment threads card in the right inspector slot.
comments.panelDescription: Comment thread summary in the bottom panel slot.

review.title: Review
review.description: Official workflow extension for proposal bundles, validation plans and accept/rollback flows.
review.viewDescription: View proposal bundles, validation results and accept/rollback operations.
review.historyPanelDescription: Proposal history in the bottom panel slot.

versionControl.title: Version Control
versionControl.description: Official workflow extension for resource versions, transaction history, checkpoints and restore entry.
versionControl.viewDescription: View resource versions, transaction logs and checkpoints.
versionControl.panelDescription: Transaction/checkpoint summary in the bottom panel slot.

eventLog.title: Event Log
eventLog.description: Official workflow extension that consumes Kernel event stream and long-running job progress.
eventLog.panelDescription: Kernel event stream and task progress in the bottom panel slot.

packageManager.title: Package Manager
packageManager.description: Official workflow extension for managing locally installed packages, templates and extensions.
packageManager.viewDescription: View and manage locally installed packages.

templateBrowser.title: Template Browser
templateBrowser.description: Official workflow extension for browsing and previewing templates from installed packages.
templateBrowser.viewDescription: Browse templates from local and installed packages.

collaborators.title: Collaborators
collaborators.description: Official workflow extension showing online collaborators and activity status.
collaborators.panelDescription: Collaborator online status in the bottom panel slot.

terminal.title: Play
terminal.description: Official workflow extension for fast in-Studio text playtesting with managed runs.
terminal.viewDescription: Play the current session without leaving Studio.
terminal.panelDescription: Text playtesting surface in the bottom panel slot.

vercelDeploy.title: Vercel Deploy
vercelDeploy.description: Official workflow extension for Vercel deployment trigger and status viewing (initially a stub).
vercelDeploy.viewDescription: Trigger Vercel deployments and view deployment status.

promptEval.title: Prompt Eval
promptEval.description: Official workflow extension for N-run prompt evaluation and A/B comparison.
promptEval.viewDescription: Run prompt evaluations and compare variants.

dynamicRegistration.kindNotAllowed: Dynamic registration of {{kind}} type extensions is not currently allowed
